div.span:
Create backdoor account
BEFORE SDProp runs

Add user to protected group
to inherit AdminCount

Remove from group later
keeps AdminCount=1

SDProp won't reset ACL
if user has AdminCount=1

Attacker modifies ACL
on privileged account

Example: Add GenericAll
permission for low-priv user

Password reset or
group membership change

5. Restore ACL from template
(removes attacker permissions)

Time: T+120 minutes
Next SDProp cycle
